program.name: Risk Router
intake.purpose: Score operational risk from incident facts and route the case to a deterministic owner queue.
intake.stages_json: [{"slug":"intake","is_bootstrap":true},{"slug":"score_risk","domain_spec":{"reads":["inputs.initial_user_text.severity","inputs.initial_user_text.customer_tier","inputs.initial_user_text.failed_logins","inputs.initial_user_text.data_exposure","runtime.now"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","risk_score":"number","severity":"string","factors":"string[]","scored_at":"ISO timestamp string"},"items_json":["risk_score:<risk_score>","severity:<severity>"]},"rules":["Parse input.domain[\"inputs.initial_user_text\"] as JSON.","Base severity points: low = 20, medium = 50, high = 70, critical = 90.","Add 15 points when customer_tier is enterprise.","Add 15 points when failed_logins is greater than or equal to 5.","Add 15 points when data_exposure is true.","risk_score = Math.min(100, severity_points + tier_points + failed_login_points + exposure_points).","severity in result_json echoes the input severity string.","factors must list the input factor names used: severity, customer_tier, failed_logins, data_exposure.","scored_at is runtime.now()."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal score_risk.","risk_score must be deterministic and capped at 100.","items_json must be exactly [\"risk_score:<risk_score>\", \"severity:<severity>\"]."]}},{"slug":"route_queue","domain_spec":{"reads":["score_risk.output.result_json.risk_score","score_risk.output.result_json.severity","inputs.initial_user_text.customer_tier","inputs.initial_user_text.data_exposure"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","risk_score":"number","owner_queue":"string","route_reason":"string"},"items_json":["owner_queue:<owner_queue>","risk_score:<risk_score>"]},"rules":["Parse score_risk.output.result_json and the original request JSON before routing.","Route to security_escalation when risk_score is at least 90.","If risk_score is below 90, route to security_escalation when customer_tier is enterprise and data_exposure is true.","Route to risk_review when risk_score is at least 60 and security_escalation does not apply.","Route to standard_ops otherwise.","route_reason must be risk_score_at_least_90 for the risk_score threshold route, enterprise_data_exposure for the enterprise exposure route, risk_score_at_least_60 for risk_review, and risk_score_below_60 for standard_ops."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal route_queue.","risk_score must be preserved from score_risk.","items_json must be exactly [\"owner_queue:<owner_queue>\", \"risk_score:<risk_score>\"]."]}},{"slug":"complete","is_terminal":true}]
